ORD-001.text: I just received the jacket but the color is dark grey, not brown like in the listing photos.
That's impossible — I shipped the exact item from the photos. The color is brown leather, it may look different under indoor lighting.
I've attached photos. This is clearly grey, not brown. I want a refund.
I see your photo. This is the same jacket. Lighting and camera settings make leather look different. No refund warranted.

ORD-002.text: Received the headset but it won't connect. Tried both USB and 3.5mm. Dead on arrival.
Sorry to hear that. Please try holding the power button for 10 seconds to reset. Also ensure USB dongle is plugged into USB 3.0 port.
Tried everything. Still completely dead. I need a replacement or full refund.
I tested this item before shipping and it worked perfectly. I believe you may have damaged it.

ORD-003.text: The ceramic set arrived — 3 of the 6 cups are broken. The packaging wasn't adequate for fragile items.
I'm so sorry! I packaged everything carefully but USPS must have damaged it in transit. I have insurance. Please file a claim and I'll help.
I've taken photos of all broken pieces and the packaging. What do we do next?
Please send the photos. I'll contact USPS and we'll get you a partial refund for the broken items.

ORD-004.text: The lens arrived but there is a large scratch on the front element that wasn't disclosed. This significantly affects image quality.
There was NO scratch when I shipped it. I inspected it carefully. The listing says 'excellent condition' and that was accurate.
I have unboxing video showing the scratch was there when I opened it. $649 and I got a damaged lens.
A video can be staged. I won't issue a refund for damage you may have caused.

ORD-005.text: It's been 10 days and my yoga mat hasn't arrived. Tracking hasn't updated in 5 days.
Tracking shows it's in transit. Sometimes USPS is slow. Please wait a few more days.
Still nothing. Tracking still frozen. I want a refund.
According to tracking it's been shipped and is on the way. I am not responsible for carrier delays.

ORD-CLEAR-001.text: It has been 20 days and my order never arrived. Tracking has been stuck in transit for over 2 weeks with no update.
I shipped it on time. The carrier must have lost it. I am not responsible for what happens after pickup.

ORD-CLEAR-002.text: I never received my jacket. I want a full refund.
FedEx tracking shows delivery at 2:32pm on Nov 8 with signature J. DOE at your address. You signed for it.

ORD-CLEAR-003.text: 3 of the 6 ceramic cups arrived completely broken. The box was crushed. I have photos.
I'm sorry! I packed each cup individually but USPS must have dropped the package. Happy to issue partial refund for broken items.

ORD-CLEAR-004.text: I ordered a size Medium blue dress but received a size XXL red shirt. Completely wrong item.
I apologize, I may have mixed up orders. I'll investigate my inventory.

ORD-BORDER-001.text: The leather jacket I received is dark grey. The listing shows brown leather. I have photos comparing both.
The jacket IS brown — it photographs differently under different lighting. This is the exact same jacket from the listing.
My photo is taken in natural daylight. It is clearly grey/charcoal not brown.
Leather color varies by lighting and camera settings. No misrepresentation occurred.

ORD-CLEAR-008.text: Received the gaming headset but it is dead on arrival. Will not power on. Tried USB 3.0, different computers, 10-second reset. Listed as brand new but clearly has a defect.
I tested it before shipping and it worked. You must have damaged it or connected it incorrectly.

ORD-BORDER-002.text: My yoga mat has been stuck in transit for 10 days. No update. Estimated delivery was 5 days ago.
Tracking shows it was picked up and is in transit. Please wait a few more days before escalating.

ORD-5050-001.text: I recorded my unboxing on video. The moment I removed the lens it had a large scratch on the front element. It was there before I even touched it. I need a full refund.
I have inspection photos taken 1 hour before shipping to DHL. The glass was perfect with zero scratches. 8 years of selling cameras, zero complaints. The buyer caused this damage after unboxing.
I can provide the timestamped video as evidence. The scratch is clearly visible the instant the box opens.
Videos can be staged or edited. My photos are from the same day with EXIF metadata. I refuse any refund.

ORD-HIGH-001.text: I paid $649 for a camera lens and tracking has been frozen for 25 days. It never arrived.
I shipped on time. The carrier must have lost it. I'm not responsible for carrier delays.

ORD-CLEAR-010.text: I received what appears to be a counterfeit watch. The serial number does not exist in the brand's database, the logo font is wrong, and the movement sounds wrong. I have expert verification.
It is genuine. I bought it from a trusted wholesaler with full documentation.
